description:
Configure the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) to analyze the performance of lane-splitting motorcycles using SUMO's sublane model. Define a motorcycle vehicle type 'moto_split' (vClass: motorcycle, width: 0.8, length: 2.2, latAlignment: arbitrary, minGapLat: 0.1, maxSpeed: 20.0) and inject a flow of 150 vehicles (id: 'moto_flow', begin: 0, end: 1000) using the first route sequence from pasubio.rou.xml. The simulation must use a lateral resolution of 0.8 and output trip information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/sublane_tripinfos.xml. Generate a report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/mode_comparison.txt containing the average duration for 'moto_split' trips and the average duration for all other trips, rounded to two decimal places, in the following format:
avg_duration_moto=[value]
avg_duration_other=[value]
